title: PVP CLICKER
body: The best PVP build for version 1.8.9! This build has good optimization and also fixes bugs, such as the mouse error that made PVP almost impossible! But with my build, that won't happen! There are also many functions that are opened by pressing Shift on the right. For example, showing CPS, TPS, FPS, armor HUD. Also, install "OptiFine" and "ThickFontFix" yourself in the build!!!!! Otherwise, the build will be incomplete, which will result in lower FPS. You can also see how many FPS you will have in the "Gallery" tab.
